# interfaces()

**Instance Method**

Returns all available Wi-Fi interfaces.

## Declaration

```swift
func interfaces() -> [CWInterface]?
```

## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.corewlan/documentation/CoreWLAN/CWInterface] objects, representing all of the available Wi-Fi interfaces in the system.

## Getting Interfaces

- **interface()**: Returns the default Wi-Fi interface.
- **interface(withName:)**: Returns the Wi-Fi interface with the given name.
- **interfaceNames()**: Returns the list of the names of available Wi-Fi interfaces.
